quote_text: "The two primal Spirits (Mainyus), who revealed themselves in vision as Twins, are the Better and the Bad, in thought and word and deed. Between these two, the wise choose aright, the foolish not." (Y
"Now these two Spirits, at the first beginning, elected to do what is good and what is evil: to the Liar (Druj) is destruction, but to the follower of Righteousness (Asha) the best existence." (Yasna

"I declare Ahura Mazda the Creator of all, and I declare the Bountiful Immortal Holy Ones (Amesha Spenta) who are seven in essence, with the Father at their head, as the directors of the world." (Yasn
"The soul of the righteous shall pass over the Bridge of the Requiter (Chinvat) to the House of Song. The soul of the deceitful shall fall into the House of Darkness." (Yasna 46.10-11, 51.13)
"At the last, O Mazda, when thou shalt bring the dead to life, the Bridge shall be for the Judge." (Yasna 34.4, paraphrased)
"The Daevas are not to be chosen, for they are all of the Druj (deceit/falsehood). They have chosen the Worst Mind and have rushed into Wrath." (Yasna 30.6)
"You Daevas are all the offspring of the Evil Mind, and he who worships you is of the Druj." (Yasna 32.3)

"At the last, the evildoer shall receive his portion, but the righteous shall attain the Best Existence. Then shall the world be renewed, the dead rise, and all be made immortal." (Yasna 34.14-15, 48.
"Then shall the Drug's power be broken, and all things shall be made perfect at the time of the Great Renovation (Frashokereti)." (Yasna 30.8-9, 51.9 paraphrased)
